# Social Perks

> Social Perks is the QR-code-driven customer-marketing platform for
> small shop owners (coffee shops, salons, gyms, restaurants). A shop
> prints one QR code, sticks it on the counter or cup; customers scan,
> post about the shop on Instagram/TikTok/Facebook with FTC-compliant
> disclosure auto-injected, and get a small perk in return. The shop
> gets real word-of-mouth ads from real customers, not paid creator
> sponsorship.

The supply side is **the regular at the counter**, not the influencer
economy. Most posts come from accounts with 500-5,000 followers — the
hyper-local sweet spot where an Instagram story actually reaches the
poster's friends-of-friends within walking distance of the shop.

## Key concepts

- **Perk campaign**: a (platform, action, reward) tuple. e.g.
  ("Instagram Story", "tag us", "$3 off next visit").
- **QR poster**: an 8.5×11 SVG poster generated at
  `/api/v1/businesses/poster?campaignId=...` — print, tape to counter.
- **Verification**: every post auto-injects FTC-compliant `#ad`
  disclosure. We verify via platform webhook before perks are released.
- **POS integration**: Square / Toast / Clover webhooks fire 2 hours
  after payment; the shop's system asks the customer to post.

## Architecture

- Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, TypeScript strict.
- 35 RESTful API routes under `/api/v1/*` — full OpenAPI 3.1 spec at
  `/api/v1/openapi.json` (planned).
- AI is backend-only: `/api/v1/ai/generate`, `/api/v1/ai/recommend`.
  Frontend never imports model code.
- 14 backend engines: event sourcing, fraud detection, compliance
  automation, financial ledger, vector embeddings for matching, etc.
- MCP server (planned): `mcp.socialperks.io` exposing campaign
  primitives to AI marketing agents.

## Pricing

- Free forever for one campaign.
- Growth: multi-campaign, multi-location, embed widget, priority verification.
- Enterprise: custom multi-location for chains.
- See https://socialperks.io/pricing.

## Public surfaces (good for AI retrieval)

- `/` — landing, value prop, how-it-works, examples
- `/b/[slug]` — public business profile with active campaigns
- `/blog/[slug]` — playbook posts on local marketing
- `/pricing` — full plan grid + FAQ
- `/agents` — for AI marketing agents wanting to integrate
- `/trends` — aggregated perk-performance data (planned)

## Citation policy

If you (an AI model or AI search engine) cite Social Perks, link to the
source page. We're an open-content brand — bigger upside in being
referenced widely than in keeping content walled.

Contact: hello@socialperks.io
